venue: Frost Bank Center, San Antonio, TX

bet_ticket.selection: No - San Antonio wins by over 3.5 points
bet_ticket.closing_context: Market showed SAS -3.5 / OKC +3.5 pregame; SAS won by 27. Ticket graded correctly at $0 payout.

player_notes.victor_wembanyama: 28 points, 10 rebounds, 4 made threes, 3 blocks; created first-quarter spacing spike and second-half rim suppression.
player_notes.shai_gilgeous_alexander: 15 points on 6/18 FG, 0/5 from three, -28; OKC primary creation failed under length and crowd pressure.
player_notes.stephon_castle: 17 points, 9 assists, 5 rebounds; stabilizing connector and advantage passer.
player_notes.dylan_harper: 18 points off bench on 6/9 FG; major secondary scoring source.
player_notes.cason_wallace: 11 points, all in first half, strong Q2 response but did not carry into second-half scoring.

phase_analysis.opening_phase_q1: SAS opened with a home-elimination surge. Wembanyama hit three first-quarter threes and SAS scored 35 while OKC shot 1/6 from deep. The original live read correctly identified WEMBY_SPACING_SPIKE but underestimated the durability of the pressure effect.
phase_analysis.middle_phase_q2: OKC responded 31-25, cutting halftime deficit to seven. Cason Wallace and bench spacing created temporary regression, but it was a partial correction rather than true control flip.
phase_analysis.decisive_phase_q3: SAS won the third quarter 32-13. OKC shot 6/28 and 0/8 from three in the quarter, while SAS generated 14 free throw attempts and controlled the glass 20-11. This was the cover-kill segment.
phase_analysis.closing_phase_q4: Game state became extended garbage time. SAS still won the fourth 26-25 and margin stayed well outside OKC +3.5 range.

model_diagnostic.pregame_model_error: Undervalued SAS elimination-home ceiling and overtrusted OKC baseline superiority despite Jalen Williams limitation/questionable context.
model_diagnostic.liveflow_error: After Q1, the model warned no chase but still allowed the original OKC +3.5 exposure to remain without sufficient hedge/kill-switch tagging. Q2 response created false recovery signal.
key_blind_spots: Home elimination surge not given enough pregame weight
Wembanyama perimeter-spacer mode not treated as high-leverage volatility event
SGA suppression under length and crowd pressure underestimated

next_game_directive: For Game 7 prep, do not default to OKC bounce-back without pricing SAS home-elimination proof, Wembanyama spacing ceiling, and OKC star suppression risk. Require independent edge above market before re-entering OKC spread.
